name: BIG PAPAS GRUB ON THE RUN

violations.description: Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. Counter near mixer was found dirty. Counter should be waned and maintained clean.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Flooring under equipment found dirty. This should be cleaned and maintained clean.

Employee dressing areas and lockers. — --Employees' clothing/possessions were in an area where contamination of food, equipment, utensils, linens or single-service items may occur. Personal drink found in the Coke cooler during inspection. Personal items should be stored separately from items used for food service.

Preventing contamination from equipment, utensils, and wiping cloths. — --Cloth for wiping food spills was not stored in sanitizing solution (at proper concentration) between uses. Wet wiping cloth found on the counter during inspection. Wiping cloths should be stored in a sanitizing solution between uses or laundered.

Clean-in-place (CIP) equipment - Design and construction. — --Food contact surface of clean in place equipment was not cleaned properly. Slicer, not used today, was found with food debris. Slicer should be cleaned more thoroughly after each use.

Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. Walk-in cooler shelving and the shelf below the main prep area were found dirty during inspection. These should be cleaned and maintained clean.--Ventilation hood system was not cleaned properly and/or as frequently as required. Hood ventilation system was found dirty. Hood ventilation system should be cleaned and maintained clean.
